board_csa_architect.notes: Pure frontend REQ with zero backend changes. Wraps existing /api/users routes. Clean component architecture with reusable modals.

board_ciso_cybersecurity.notes: Self-escalation prevention is critical and included. RLS enforced at API layer already. No new attack surface — UI only. Admin-gated visibility.

board_caio_fullstack.notes: No AI or VRAM impact. Pure CRUD UI components. No model loading or inference.

board_vp_ops_devops.notes: Zero infrastructure changes. Frontend-only deployment. No new services, no migrations, no background workers.

board_red_team.notes: APPROVE WITH CONDITIONS: (1) Last admin guard: the UI MUST prevent deactivation of the last admin in an org — if API lacks this check, add it. (2) Invite rate limit: MUST enforce max 20 invites per hour per org to prevent spam. (3) Email validation: invite form MUST validate email format and reject disposable email domains. Anti-AC: MUST NEVER allow bulk invite without confirmation for lists >5 users.
